summary: Role 4 round 2 consensus review inspected the revised remaining-gaps consensus plan and behavior-related implementation references. Verdict: AGREE for plan sufficiency, not implementation completion.
decisions: AGREE: The revised P1-09 plan now includes behavior_recall_audit ledger fields, trigger coverage for completion/handoff/error/direction_change, performed/skipped/not_applicable plus reason failure criteria, feedback correction later retrieval proof, contradicted-memory hold/merge/demote handling, and answer-quality/judge-backed evaluation requirements.
Scope is document-plan sufficiency only; current src/index.ts and src/behavior-eval.ts still show existing implementation is proxy/partial and not complete.
next_steps: Continue round 2 consensus reviews for the remaining roles.
Do not mark implementation complete until verify:behavior-recall and answer-quality implementation exist and pass.
